2158020.name: Gallery
2158020.description:
A art gallery where players see if they can survive a zombie wave.

Players are free to explore the gallery and the fine paintings within when they are looking to relax and when its time for action they can press the button that releases a zombie wave. Players can expect to fight zombies until they can no longer continue! Zombies get bigger and stronger with each death! One click of the button and this simple gallery is transformed into the ultimate zombie wave survival game.

The game features art, guns, and zombies! What more could a gamer ask for!
